## Describe your changes

Please describe the changes you've made. Explain *why* this change is necessary and *how* you implemented it. Provide specific context for reviewers.

## Issue ticket number and link

Mention the issue number this PR addresses (e.g. Closes #42).

## Checklist before requesting a review
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] If it is a core feature, I have added thorough tests.
- [ ] I have verified there are no UI glitches in dark mode / glassmorphism styling.
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (`npm run lint` passes).

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Place screenshots of old vs new here.
